description:
Production observability dashboard for job-producer. Covers API request health, job production throughput, Kafka producer performance, latency percentiles, error budget indicators, and JVM/process resource pressure.

How to use this dashboard: Start from the top Overview row to verify SLO health, then drill into throughput, latency, errors, and capacity sections to isolate bottlenecks. Use the template filters (environment, instance, topic, job type, endpoint, and command where available) to narrow scope during incidents and compare behavior across dimensions. Panel info icon meaning: Click the i icon in each panel header to see what the metric represents, how to interpret normal vs abnormal values, and what operational signal it provides.

panels.title: Service Uptime
panels.description: job-producer process uptime. Orange < 5 min (recently restarted), yellow < 1 h, green ≥ 1 h.
Total jobs accepted and recorded by job-producer over the selected time range.
panels.title: Jobs Produced (Window Total)

panels.description: HTTP error ratio across the selected endpoints (excluding actuator).
panels.title: Error Rate %

panels.description: Target availability for the selected instance set.
panels.title: Availability %
API Request Rate
panels.description: Current HTTP request throughput (requests/second) for job-producer.

panels.title: Request Rate by Endpoint

targets.expr: sum by (method, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))

panels.description: HTTP request rate broken down by endpoint and HTTP method for job-producer.
Flow of submitted jobs into Kafka with error and retry context.
panels.title: Kafka Send, Error, Retry Rates

panels.description: Kafka producer throughput and network traffic into the broker.
panels.title: Kafka Producer Ingress Detail

panels.description: Producer efficiency: request sizing and records-per-request at runtime.
panels.title: Kafka Producer Efficiency Metrics
Top Endpoints by Traffic

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (method, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Top endpoints by current request rate (excluding actuator).

panels.title: Latency vs Error Correlation

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Correlates p99 API latency with HTTP error percentage to detect user-impacting degradation.
Combined API latency percentiles for fast comparison and trend analysis.
panels.title: HTTP Latency p50/p90/p99

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Tail-latency spread signal. Rising p99-p50 indicates instability even if average latency appears stable.
panels.title: Latency Spread (p99 - p50)

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))) - histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", uri!~"/actuator.*", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"$env"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: HTTP 4xx and 5xx request rates over time.
panels.title: HTTP Error Rate (4xx/5xx)

panels.description: Kafka producer errors and retries by topic.
panels.title: Kafka Errors and Retries by Topic

panels.description: Top endpoints contributing to 5xx response volume.
panels.title: Top 10 Endpoints by 5xx Rate

panels.description: HTTP exception taxonomy extracted from `http_server_requests_seconds_count` exception tag.
panels.title: Exception Rate by Type

panels.description: JVM heap and non-heap memory profile for job-producer.
panels.title: JVM Memory (Heap and Non-Heap)

panels.description: Process-level memory and CPU utilisation.
panels.title: Process RSS and CPU

panels.description: Kafka producer buffer utilization and in-flight requests.
panels.title: Kafka Backpressure (Buffer/Queue Depth Proxy)

panels.description: Threading, active request concurrency and GC pause tail latency.
panels.title: Threads, Active Requests, and GC
API Requests (Window Total)
panels.description: Total HTTP requests across selected applications (excluding actuator) over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: Request Success %

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(100 * sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", env=~"$env", outcome="SUCCESS", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)), 1e-9), 0), 100)

panels.description: Percentage of HTTP requests completing successfully, based on the current rate.

panels.title: API Latency p95
panels.description: 95th percentile HTTP request latency across all selected applications.

targets.expr: sum by (service) ((http_server_requests_active_seconds_gcount{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}) or (http_server_requests_active_seconds_active_count{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}))

panels.title: In-Flight Requests (Backpressure)
panels.description: Number of HTTP requests currently being processed (active / in-flight) per application. Uses Micrometer LongTaskTimer active-count metric with compatibility fallback for both OpenMetrics variants (`http_server_requests_active_seconds_gcount` and `http_server_requests_active_seconds_active_count`). Sustained high values indicate thread-pool saturation or upstream blocking. Sudden spikes coinciding with p99 latency rises confirm concurrency-driven slowdowns.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Send Rate by Topic
panels.description: Kafka producer record send rate by topic for job-producer.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Error Rate
panels.description: Kafka producer record error rate by topic for job-producer.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, service, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{service=~"${producer_service:regex}", env=~"$env", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))))

panels.title: Top Endpoints by Latency
panels.description: Top 10 HTTP endpoints ranked by p99 latency. Computed as a point-in-time snapshot over the selected rate interval.

panels.title: Kafka Send Failure %
panels.description: Kafka send failure percentage derived from producer error and send rates.

title: Job Producer
